uplink.description: Weather group (dataId 0x01): temperature, humidity, light, UV, wind
uplink._note: Synthetic SenseCAP S2100 telemetry frame (dataId 0x01); expected.data via the ported upstream decoder (oracle). 4097->air.temperature, 4098->air.relativeHumidity, 4099->air.lightIntensity, 4105->wind.speed; UV as extra.

uplink.description: Weather group (dataId 0x02): wind direction, rainfall, barometric pressure
uplink._note: Synthetic SenseCAP S2100 frame (dataId 0x02). 4113->rain.cumulative; barometric pressure (Pa) /100 -> air.pressure (hPa). Union with the 0x01 frame covers weather-station + rain-gauge.
